title: corispermum pallasii subsp. pallasii
intro: Corispermum pallasii subsp. pallasii, also known as Pallas' saltwort, is a type of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and aid in wound healing. The health benefits of Corispermum pallasii subsp. pallasii include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial properties which can help to prevent infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
